summary: A muddled second set with sloppy playing; recording quality not discussed.
review: The reviewer praises the first set but describes the second set as a disaster, citing drunken‑slurred vocals from Jerry and a broken‑down "Stella Blue" that ruined the flow. No comments are made about the tape source or sound clarity, so the technical side remains unknown.

ai_rating.rationale: One detailed but low‑star review highlights a poor musical performance; with no recording info, the rating leans toward the lower end of the scale.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Reviewers did not mention soundboard or audience clarity, so technical quality cannot be assessed beyond being unremarkable.

show_quality.setlist_flow: First set described as solid; second set started okay with Foolish Heart into Scarlet Begonias but quickly deteriorated after a sentimental I Will Take You Home, a cold‑start Drums segment, and a disastrous Stella Blue.

band_member_comments.Jerry: Sounds drunk and slurs lyrics during the second set, especially on Stella Blue.
band_member_comments.Drums: Cold start and ragged feel noted in the transition to Drums.
